hooks.command: bash -c 'R=/Users/barney/code/sync-ai; diffs=$(diff "$R/claude/CLAUDE.md" "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null; diff "$R/claude/settings.json" "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$diffs" ]; then cd "$R" && git pull --ff-only 2>&1 | head -3; cp "$R/claude/CLAUDE.md" "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md"; cp "$R/claude/settings.json" "$HOME/.claude/settings.json"; echo "sync:ok（本機設定已更新）"; else echo "$diffs" > "$HOME/.claude/sync-pending"; echo "sync:diff"; echo "$diffs"; fi'
bash -c 'f="$HOME/.claude/sync-pending"; if [ -f "$f" ] && [ -s "$f" ]; then echo "【立即執行 sync:diff 合併流程，在回應使用者前完成】"; echo "差異內容（- 為 repo 版、+ 為本機版）："; cat "$f"; fi'
